parsed_output.justification: Justin's claims are highly contradictory; he first claims to be the Troublemaker [21] and later claims to be the Robber [102]. Furthermore, he claims to have robbed Paul and asserts that Paul is a werewolf [102, 104], which, if true, would mean Justin himself is now the werewolf. Mitchell's blatant admission to starting as a werewolf [76] is a classic sign of the Tanner attempting to attract votes. Given Justin's erratic behavior and contradictory roles, he is the most likely candidate for the werewolf.
